description: You are a technical artist who has received a Blender scene that produces an incorrect render. Diagnose and fix all rendering issues to ensure the scene correctly shows a properly lit red cube on a ground plane. The final render must have a resolution of at least 1280x720 and at least 16 render samples, with all objects visible and the camera correctly positioned. Save the rendered image to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/fixed_render.png and the corrected project file to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/fixed_scene.blend.
